imaging_summary: Exam: 1.2 cm lesion on the right labium; no palpable groin nodes.
pathology_summary: Biopsy: superficially invasive squamous cell carcinoma, depth of invasion 0.8 mm.
proposed_plan: Wide local excision without inguinofemoral lymph node dissection.
patient_preferences: Prefers the least extensive surgery that is still appropriate.
